flood_storage.name: Flood Storage & Delay
flood_storage.description: Store, slow, and redirect water to reduce flood peaks

urban_cooling.name: Urban Cooling & Shade
urban_cooling.description: Reduce surface and air temperature where people are exposed

slope_stability.name: Slope Stabilization
slope_stability.description: Stabilize slopes and control runoff to prevent landslides

multi_benefit.name: Multi-Benefit Solutions
multi_benefit.description: Hybrid interventions addressing multiple hazards simultaneously

interventions.name: Floodable Park / Detention Basin
interventions.description: Regrade terrain, add controlled inlets/outlets, allow temporary inundation during storm events
interventions.implementationNotes: Needs hydraulic connection to drainage system; design for periodic flooding with 2-10 year return period
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Quarterly debris removal, annual inlet/outlet inspection, vegetation management

interventions.name: Sponge Square / Plaza
interventions.description: Replace impervious paving with permeable surfaces and add subsurface storage
interventions.implementationNotes: Underground utilities are main constraint; requires geotechnical assessment
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Semi-annual surface cleaning, annual subsurface inspection

interventions.name: Multi-use Retention Yard
interventions.description: Depressed playfield with permeable courts and bioswales for water retention
interventions.implementationNotes: Requires safety considerations and school calendar coordination
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular surface maintenance, drainage system checks

interventions.name: Detention & Infiltration Field
interventions.description: Sports field with engineered soil profile and underdrain for water detention
interventions.implementationNotes: Turf selection critical for drainage and playability
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular turf maintenance, underdrain flushing

interventions.name: Constructed Wetland
interventions.description: Expand or create wetland area to slow flows and provide natural water treatment
interventions.implementationNotes: Strong biodiversity co-benefits; requires hydrological study
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Annual vegetation management, water quality monitoring

interventions.name: Permeable Street Retrofit
interventions.description: Replace conventional paving with permeable asphalt/concrete and infiltration trenches
interventions.implementationNotes: Best as part of larger drainage network; requires traffic management during construction
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular surface cleaning to maintain permeability

interventions.name: Tree Canopy Corridor
interventions.description: Continuous street trees with structural soil cells for healthy root growth
interventions.implementationNotes: Requires adequate root space and long-term maintenance commitment
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular watering during establishment (2-3 years), annual pruning

interventions.name: Shade & Cooling Retrofit
interventions.description: Add trees, pergolas, and light-colored surfaces to existing public spaces
interventions.implementationNotes: Focus on peak-use hours and high-traffic areas
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular cleaning, vegetation care, structure maintenance

interventions.name: Cooling Campus
interventions.description: Dense canopy coverage and shade structures for schools and hospitals
interventions.implementationNotes: High social value; coordinate with institutional operations
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular vegetation care, annual structure inspection

interventions.name: Pocket Park
interventions.description: Convert vacant lots or underused spaces to shaded green areas
interventions.implementationNotes: Fast wins in dense urban areas; community engagement important
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular upkeep, community stewardship programs

interventions.name: Green / Cool Roofs
interventions.description: Vegetated or reflective roof surfaces to reduce building and ambient temperatures
interventions.implementationNotes: Requires structural assessment for load capacity
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Semi-annual inspection, irrigation system maintenance

interventions.name: Hillside Reforestation
interventions.description: Deep-root species planting on slopes to stabilize soil and control runoff
interventions.implementationNotes: Time lag of 5-10 years before full stabilization effect
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Fire management, invasive species control, replanting gaps

interventions.name: Vegetated Terraces
interventions.description: Terracing with vegetation to reduce slope angle and improve stability
interventions.implementationNotes: Requires slope engineering expertise and proper drainage design
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular inspection, vegetation management, drainage clearing

interventions.name: Riparian Buffer Stabilization
interventions.description: Reinforce stream banks with deep-root vegetation to prevent erosion
interventions.implementationNotes: Prevents erosion and reduces downstream flooding
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Annual inspection, debris removal, replanting as needed

interventions.name: Controlled Drainage System
interventions.description: Small check dams and lined channels to manage slope runoff
interventions.implementationNotes: Avoid concentrating flows; integrate with larger drainage network
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular debris clearing, structural inspection

interventions.name: Surface Runoff Diversion
interventions.description: Interceptor drains upslope of vulnerable areas to redirect water
interventions.implementationNotes: Critical for protecting informal settlements on slopes
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular clearing, especially before rainy season

interventions.name: Floodable Shaded Park
interventions.description: Detention basin with dense tree canopy for combined flood and heat reduction
interventions.implementationNotes: Requires flood-tolerant tree species and proper grading
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Combined vegetation and drainage maintenance

interventions.name: Sponge & Cooling Campus
interventions.description: Schools/hospitals with integrated water retention and cooling features
interventions.implementationNotes: Protects vulnerable populations; coordinate with institutional schedules
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular maintenance of vegetation, drainage, and shade structures

interventions.name: Terraced Retention System
interventions.description: Hillside terracing with water retention to reduce runoff and stabilize slopes
interventions.implementationNotes: Prevents cascading slope-to-flood failures
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Regular terrace inspection, vegetation management, drainage clearing

interventions.name: Green-Blue Corridor
interventions.description: Integrated linear park along waterways combining flood storage, cooling, and stability
interventions.implementationNotes: System-level resilience; requires cross-jurisdictional coordination
interventions.maintenanceRequirements: Complex multi-asset maintenance program
